text:
Created attachment 204416
drupa7.67 update patch

There is new version of www/drupal7 which covers CVE-2019-11831 - see https://www.drupal.org/SA-CORE-2019-007

I've made a patch for port update. It was tested with poudriere. You can check logfile at http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing-php71/2019-05-17_09h00m17s/logs/drupal7-7.67.log
